mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tbox_brain_dump ( dump_id, tbox_date, user_id, dump_title, dump_content, goal_id, priority_yn, status, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{dumpId}, #{tboxDate}::date, #{userId}, #{dumpTitle}, #{dumpContent}, #{goalId}, #{priorityYn}, #{status}, #{userId}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (dump_id) DO UPDATE SET dump_title = EXCLUDED.dump_title, dump_content = EXCLUDED.dump_content, priority_yn = EXCLUDED.priority_yn, status = EXCLUDED.status, upd_id = EXCLUDED.reg_id, mod_dt = now() ;
mapper.select: SELECT tt.time_table_id, tt.dump_id, TO_CHAR(tt.tbox_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS tbox_date, tt.user_id, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute, tt.color, bd.dump_title, bd.dump_content, bd.priority_yn, bd.complete_yn, bd.status FROM tb_tbox_time_table tt LEFT JOIN tb_tbox_brain_dump bd ON tt.dump_id = bd.dump_id WHERE tt.user_id = #{userId} AND tt.dump_id = #{dumpId} ORDER BY tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute

SELECT tt.time_table_id, tt.dump_id, TO_CHAR(tt.tbox_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS tbox_date, tt.user_id, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute, tt.color, tt.reg_id, TO_CHAR(tt.reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reg_dt, tt.upd_id, TO_CHAR(tt.mod_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS mod_dt, bd.dump_title, bd.priority_yn, bd.complete_yn, bd.status FROM tb_tbox_time_table tt LEFT JOIN tb_tbox_brain_dump bd ON tt.dump_id = bd.dump_id WHERE tt.user_id = #{userId} AND tt.tbox_date = #{tboxDate}::date ORDER BY tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute

SELECT tt.time_table_id, tt.dump_id, TO_CHAR(tt.tbox_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS tbox_date, tt.user_id, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute, tt.color, tt.reg_id, TO_CHAR(tt.reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reg_dt, tt.upd_id, TO_CHAR(tt.mod_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS mod_dt, bd.dump_title, bd.priority_yn, bd.complete_yn, bd.status FROM tb_tbox_time_table tt LEFT JOIN tb_tbox_brain_dump bd ON tt.dump_id = bd.dump_id WHERE tt.user_id = #{userId} AND tt.tbox_date between #{startDate}::date and #{endDate}::date ORDER BY tt.tbox_date, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute

SELECT tt.time_table_id, tt.dump_id, TO_CHAR(tt.tbox_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS tbox_date, tt.user_id, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute, tt.color, tt.reg_id, TO_CHAR(tt.reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS reg_dt, tt.upd_id, TO_CHAR(tt.mod_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS mod_dt, bd.dump_title, bd.priority_yn, bd.complete_yn, bd.status FROM tb_tbox_time_table tt LEFT JOIN tb_tbox_brain_dump bd ON tt.dump_id = bd.dump_id WHERE tt.user_id = #{userId} AND tt.tbox_date between #{startDate}::date and #{endDate}::date ORDER BY tt.tbox_date, tt.time_hour, tt.time_minute
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tbox_time_table ( time_table_id, dump_id, tbox_date, user_id, time_hour, time_minute, color, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{timeTableId}, #{dumpId}, #{tboxDate}::date, #{userId}, #{timeHour}, #{timeMinute}, #{color}, #{userId}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (time_table_id) DO UPDATE SET dump_id = EXCLUDED.dump_id, time_hour = EXCLUDED.time_hour, time_minute = EXCLUDED.time_minute, color = EXCLUDED.color, upd_id = EXCLUDED.reg_id, mod_dt = now() ;
